data.title: Opna Bio Announces Fast Track Designation Granted to OPN-6602 for the Treatment of Multiple Myeloma
data.description: In South San Francisco, Opna Bio, a biopharmaceutical company, revealed that the FDA has given Fast Track status to OPN-6602, a dual EP300/CBP inhibitor, for addressing multiple myeloma. This designation is for patients with relapsed/refractory MM after four prior lines of therapy. OPN-6602 aims to provide innovative oncology treatment.

data.title: Baby Boomers Remain Largest Share of Home Buyers as First-Time Buying Falls to Record Low
data.description: Roughly 20% of buyers were first-time purchasers, with the majority of buyers being repeat customers.

data.title: TON falls below $1.30 support, heading to $1.19 in 72 hours. Bears dominate as indicators confirm downward trend.
data.description: The price of TON has dropped by 5% to $1.30, breaking through a key zone, and is now heading towards $1.24 and potentially $1.19. Momentum indicators support this downward trend, indicating bearish control over the market unless a reversal is demonstrated.

data.title: Eco Innovation Group, Inc. (ECOX) Initiates Frankfurt Exchange Dual Listing Process and Advances European SAF Strategy
data.description: Eco Innovation Group has started the process of  dual listing on the Frankfurt Exchange. This move is part of their strategy to expand in Europe, with a specific focus on Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF). The company is targeting a broader investor base and aims to tap into the European market. The decision aligns with the company's goal to boost its presence and strengthen its position in the industry. This step is significant as the European market presents a lucrative opportunity for growth. It reflects Eco Innovation Group's commitment to sustainable practices and highlights its proactive approach towards fostering eco-friendly solutions.

This led to institutional investors increasing their buying activity, potentially setting up a forceful rally towards the $42 resistance level. The sudden sell-off has created the ideal volatile environment for GIGGLE's upcoming...
Snowmobile Maker BRP Suspends FY27 Outlook As US Tariffs Pressure Affects Costs

data.title: PepsiCo Analysts Boost Their Forecasts After Upbeat Q1 Earnings
data.description: In the latest financial update, PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ: PEP) reported a strong first quarter performance. The company's adjusted earnings per share for the quarter stood at $1.61, exceeding the projected $1.55. With quarterly sales reaching $19.44 billion, PepsiCo outperformed the expected $18.94 billion. However, the company revised its fiscal 2026 outlook, reducing the adjusted EPS guidance to $8.46-$8.63 from the earlier range of $8.55-$8.71. Similarly, the sales forecast for fiscal 2026 was adjusted to $95.803 billion-$97.682 billion from the previous $97.682 billion-$99.561 billion. Despite these adjustments, PepsiCo's Chairman and CEO, Ramon Laguarta, emphasized the positive performance of the international business segment and highlighted the progress made in North America. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: REQ's price plunges to $0.06 in 10 days due to overbought conditions easing. RSI at 70.63, 11% above upper Bollinger Band, foreshadows correction. Institutional profit-taking drives accelerated distribution.
data.description: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) for REQ is currently at 70.63, indicating a potential overbought condition. The position is 11% above the upper Bollinger Band, suggesting a likely immediate correction towards the support level of $0.06. There is a noticeable increase in the distribution phase as institutional investors are taking profits, which is surpassing the buying activity from retail investors.

data.title: Airbag Giant Autoliv Delivers Blowout Quarter, Thanks To India And China
data.description: Autoliv, Inc. (NYSE: ALV) experienced a surge in stock price following the release of its first-quarter results which surpassed expectations. The firm showcased robust sales growth and steady demand across key markets. Particularly notable was the sustained momentum in Asia and enhanced underlying profitability, despite facing some margin challenges. In specific figures, the first-quarter adjusted earnings per share stood at $2.05, exceeding the anticipated $1.89. Quarterly sales reached $2.753 billion, marking a 6.8% increase from the previous year and surpassing the projected $2.605 billion. However, adjusted operating income decreased by 3.9% year over year to $245 million, with the adjusted operating margin shrinking to 8.9% from 9.9% compared to the previous year. Notably, underlying profitability showed improvement through a 10% growth in gross profit. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AI traffic surges 393% to US retailers in Q1 2026, outspending human shoppers. Revenue boost seen from agentic visitors.
data.description: In the beginning of 2026, there was a significant increase in AI-driven traffic to retail websites in the U.S. These automated visitors have been responsible for driving a higher revenue compared to traditional human shoppers.

data.title: Molecular Partners presents three posters at AACR 2026, with new preclinical data for first Switch-DARPin T cell engager MP0632 and DLL3 Radio-DARPin MP0712
data.description: Today, Molecular Partners AG, a biotech company, revealed new preclinical data at the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting 2026. The company, known for developing DARPin therapeutics, showcased the data through three posters. The company's stocks are listed on the SIX (MOLN) and NASDAQ (MOLN) stock exchanges. The event took place in Zurich-Schlieren, Switzerland, and Concord, Massachusetts.

data.title: PureHealth Research GLP-1 Supplements Blend African Mango and Green Coffee Extract for Daily Satiety Support
data.description: On April 19, 2026, in Manassas, Virginia, PureHealth Research announced the launch of new natural GLP-1 supplements. These supplements are crafted from clinically studied botanical extracts aimed at enhancing healthy satiety signaling and supporting daily metabolic function. Each of these doctor-approved formulas is tailored to offer these benefits naturally, providing consumers with an effective and safe option for their dietary and health needs.

data.title: Harmonic Enables DIRECTV to Reimagine Nationwide DTH Service
data.description: In a recent announcement, Harmonic revealed that its Cloud-Native VOS Media Software is successfully reducing costs for users by consolidating media playout to delivery on a single platform. This development was shared by Harmonic in San Jose, California on April 19, 2026. The company mentioned that DIRECTV is currently utilizing this technology to revamp its U.S. direct-to-home (DTH) video platform. Notably, Harmonic is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol HLIT.

data.title: AVAX aims for $12 by May 15 with whales buying big. 69% long positions and 8.32% surge in open interest. Technicals suggest $12+ in 4 weeks.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AVAX has surpassed a crucial resistance level as smart investors are holding 69% long positions, and the open interest has spiked by 8.32% overnight. Technical analysis indicates a potential rise to over $12 in the next four weeks as the token breaks out of its consolidation phase.

data.title: API3 price crashes below $0.30, 22% drop hints at further decline. Potential drop to $0.28 support, with chances of hitting $0.23 in 48 hours.

Market experts estimate a 70% chance of this scenario unfolding. Analysis of smart money indicates potential further drop to $0.23 before any significant recovery.

data.title: PROM corrects by $1.50 on RSI of 80 and negative funding rates, possibly hitting $1.50 in 7 days amid institutional retreat.
data.description: The ongoing surge in PROM's value comes to a halt as it reaches overbought status, indicated by a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 80. Additionally, negative funding rates suggest institutional investors are pulling back. Technical analysis shows a potential drop to $1.50 within the next week as investors capitalize on profits.

data.title: BIO Token aims for $0.04 mark, consolidating at $0.03; technical setup signals potential uptrend in 14 days.
data.description: BIO is currently stabilizing around a support level of $0.03, with indicators showing momentum that could lead to a breakthrough towards a resistance level of $0.04. The current technical analysis indicates a potential upward trend in the next two weeks. However, there is a risk of a downturn if the support level is not maintained.

data.description: The technical compression of LINK at $9.29, along with increasing institutional interest, indicates a potential breakout above the $9.60 resistance level. Analysts predict a target range of $10.50 to $11.00 within the next three weeks.

data.title: ZRO likely to test $1.40 amid crumbling institutional narrative and oversold indicators before aiming for $2.00.
data.description: The technical foundation of ZRO is deteriorating despite excitement surrounding partnerships, as oversold signals suggest a potential retest of $1.40 before a significant rebound towards the $2.00 mark.
